title: Gap Analysis
description: It is a process of identifying gaps between the current state and the desired state in terms of ISO standards, which helps in determining the scope of work required for certification.

title: Documentation
description: This includes creating necessary documents like policies, procedures, and work instructions as per ISO standards to establish and maintain a quality management system.

title: System Implementation
description: The implementation of ISO standards involves the establishment of a quality management system that is compliant with the ISO standard requirements.

title: Internal Audit
description: The internal audit is a process of evaluating the effectiveness of the implemented quality management system to identify areas for improvement before the external certification audit.

title: Certification
description: Once the organization has been deemed compliant with the ISO standard requirements, they can undergo an external certification audit by an accredited certification body to receive certification.

title: Training
description: It is crucial to provide necessary training to the employees regarding the ISO standard requirements and quality management system procedures to ensure proper implementation and maintenance of the system.
